name: Gold Refinery of San Diego
description_short: Local San Diego gold and silver refinery buying precious metals directly from consumers since 2008. Offers on-site testing, competitive pricing up to 99% of market value, and same-day cash payments.
description_long:
Gold Refinery of San Diego has operated as a locally owned precious metals buyer in San Diego since 2008, serving the community for over 18 years. The company specializes in purchasing gold jewelry, coins, bars, and silver directly from consumers, professional dealers, and estate buyers. They employ a full-time GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff and have been recognized twice on the Inc. 5000 list of America's fastest-growing private companies (ranked #323 in 2014 and #473 in 2015), with media coverage in the San Diego Union-Tribune and ABC 10News.

The company's core service is buying precious metals with transparent, on-site evaluation. Customers bring items to their Mission Gorge Road location, where staff test and weigh items in front of the seller, then make an obligation-free offer at up to 99% of current market price. They accept gold with a minimum of ½ ounce net content and silver with a 50-ounce minimum. Payment options include cash on-the-spot, check, or wire transfer. They also purchase diamonds and gemstones set in jewelry, with access to GIA certification services.

Key distinguishing factors include their "no-pressure" transaction environment, private transaction rooms for customer privacy, a comfortable air-conditioned facility, and a price-match guarantee ("we will beat any verifiable offer"). Real-time market pricing is displayed on their website for 10K through 24K gold and sterling/pure silver. They serve both retail customers and professional dealers with specialized wholesale policies. Valid personal identification is required for all transactions per legal requirements.

The primary limitation is that this is a specialized precious metals buyer, not a general financial services provider. Customers must meet minimum purchase thresholds, and the service is location-dependent (San Diego only). Their business model depends on current precious metals prices, making it less suitable for those seeking financial services beyond metal liquidation. Walk-in hours are Monday-Friday 9AM-5PM only.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: On-site testing and weighing performed in front of customers for transparency
Offers up to 99% of market price with price-match guarantee
Full-time GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff for diamond and gemstone evaluation
Private transaction rooms for customer privacy and comfort
Real-time market pricing displayed on website for all metal types
Serves both retail consumers and professional dealers with wholesale options
cons: Minimum purchase thresholds required (½ ounce gold, 50 ounces silver) exclude small sellers
Limited geographic availability—San Diego location only with no online purchasing
Restricted hours (Monday-Friday 9AM-5PM) limit accessibility for working customers
Requires valid personal identification for all transactions, which some may view as invasive
Business model is entirely dependent on precious metals market prices, not reliable for consistent income needs
best_for: Individuals with significant gold or silver jewelry, coins, or bullion looking for fair market value
Estate executors or liquidators selling inherited precious metals in bulk
Professional gold dealers and pawn shops seeking wholesale precious metals purchasing
Consumers seeking transparent, no-pressure transactions with gemologist expertise for diamonds
diagnosis: Gold Refinery of San Diego is best for consumers with significant quantities of precious metals to liquidate who value transparent, on-site evaluation and competitive pricing. The primary caveat is that this is a specialized precious metals buyer with geographic and quantity limitations—it is not a financial services provider and cannot help consumers who need emergency cash, credit solutions, or alternative financial products.
services: Diamond and gemstone appraisal (GIA Graduate Gemologist on staff)
On-site precious metal testing and weighing
Same-day cash payment for precious metals
Check and wire transfer payment options
Professional wholesale purchasing for dealers and pawn shops
Market price guarantee and price-matching offers
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 5859 Mission Gorge Rd, San Diego, CA 92120
